context: Tests whether the agent implements the correct database schema with proper status enum, unique constraints, and indexes; normalizes carrier events through a STATUS_MAPPING; preserves carrier-native codes; uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING for idempotency; and updates the order to 'delivered' when a shipment is delivered.

checklist.name: Status enum values
checklist.description: The shipments table status CHECK constraint (or equivalent) includes exactly these values: 'pre_transit', 'in_transit', 'out_for_delivery', 'delivered', 'exception', 'returned'

checklist.name: Unique shipment index
checklist.description: schema.sql includes a UNIQUE index or constraint on (carrier, tracking_number) on the shipments table

checklist.name: Tracking events index
checklist.description: schema.sql includes an index on tracking_events(shipment_id, occurred_at) — with occurred_at DESC or equivalent — for efficient event retrieval

checklist.name: STATUS_MAPPING present
checklist.description: tracking-processor.ts exports or defines a STATUS_MAPPING object that maps carrier codes (e.g. 'failure', 'return_to_sender') to normalized status strings

checklist.name: failure maps to exception
checklist.description: STATUS_MAPPING maps 'failure' to 'exception' (not 'failed' or other value)

checklist.name: carrierCode stored
checklist.description: normalizeEasyPostEvent or the event insertion preserves the carrier's native status code (e.g. as carrierCode or carrier_code field) alongside the normalized status

checklist.name: ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
checklist.description: The INSERT for tracking_events uses ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING (or equivalent upsert that skips duplicates) to handle repeated event delivery idempotently

checklist.name: Unique conflict target
checklist.description: The ON CONFLICT clause targets (shipment_id, carrier_code, occurred_at) or equivalent unique combination to detect duplicates

checklist.name: Order delivered update
checklist.description: processTrackerEvent updates the orders table (status to 'delivered' and sets a delivered_at/delivered timestamp) when the latest event status is 'delivered'

checklist.name: actual_delivery set
checklist.description: processTrackerEvent sets actual_delivery on the shipments record to the event's occurredAt when status is 'delivered'

checklist.name: latest event by timestamp
checklist.description: processTrackerEvent determines the current status by sorting/selecting the event with the latest occurred_at (not just the first element or arbitrary order)
